title: EGFR Resistance Biology Notes
text: Secondary EGFR mutations can reduce inhibitor binding and create resistance. Useful research triage combines mutation annotations, pathway context, and assay response curves before proposing a new medicinal chemistry direction.

title: Kinase Series SAR Review
text: The lead series improved biochemical potency after hinge-binding optimization, but selectivity against closely related kinases remained the main program risk. Chemists requested side-by-side evidence from potency, selectivity, and physicochemical-property tables.

title: Microsomal Stability Observation
text: Several analogs showed high intrinsic clearance in liver microsomes. A retrieval workflow should connect clearance observations to structure alerts, solubility notes, and previous optimization decisions.

title: Cellular Assay Transfer Memo
text: Cellular potency did not track biochemical potency for a subset of compounds. Follow-up analysis should inspect permeability, efflux, target engagement, and assay-window differences before concluding mechanism failure.

title: Research RAG Evaluation Pattern
text: A production research assistant should store source metadata, rank retrieved snippets, cite every generated claim, evaluate top-k precision with scientist labels, and log user feedback for continuous improvement.

title: Agentic Workflow Guardrails
text: Agentic research workflows should separate retrieval, synthesis, tool use, and reviewer roles. The reviewer should flag missing evidence, unsupported causal claims, safety-sensitive recommendations, and experiment-readiness gaps.

title: ELN and Literature Data Ingestion
text: Scientific RAG systems require chunking protocols, assay tables, ELN notes, and literature summaries with stable identifiers. Pipelines should preserve project, modality, target, and access-control metadata.

title: Cloud Deployment Considerations
text: A cloud-ready implementation can deploy the API behind an application load balancer, persist documents in object storage, use managed relational metadata, and run embedding refresh jobs on a scheduled worker.
